# MolDraw LLM Index

> MolDraw is a free web-based chemistry editor and 3D viewer by Scidart Academy.

- App: https://www.moldraw.com/
- Tools: https://www.moldraw.com/tools/index.html
- Course: https://www.moldraw.com/course/index.html
- Blog: https://www.moldraw.com/blog/index.html
- AI setup: https://www.moldraw.com/pages/ai-help.html
